mechanism: Fiscal deficits mechanically support aggregate corporate profits (Kalecki identity), extending the runway before QT triggers financial stress. The buffer delays Phase 1 onset by maintaining cash flows to the real economy but does not prevent stress from propagating through leveraged financial channels once triggered.
regime_dependence: Effective while government deficits remain at 6-7% GDP. Buffer operates on aggregates — individual leveraged entities facing margin calls receive no protection. Strongest as an explanation for past QT resilience; weakest as a prediction of indefinite resilience.
